helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow hot [options]

[read] Hot Stack Overflow questions

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  --trace <mode>      Trace capture: off, on, retain-on-failure (default: "off")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Access: read | Browser: no | Domain: stackoverflow.com
Example: opencli stackoverflow hot -f yaml
Output columns: rank, id, title, score, answers, views, is_answered, tags, author, creation_date, url

helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow search [options] <query>

[read] Search Stack Overflow questions

Arguments:
  query               Search query

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  --trace <mode>      Trace capture: off, on, retain-on-failure (default: "off")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Access: read | Browser: no | Domain: stackoverflow.com
Example: opencli stackoverflow search <query> -f yaml
Output columns: rank, id, title, score, answers, views, is_answered, tags, author, creation_date, url
